Command.Description: Add or update an authored documentation page in a MetaDocs workspace.
Command.Name: author-page

Command.Description: Import an authored MetaCli workspace into a MetaDocs workspace.
Command.Name: import-cli

Command.Description: Import command-oriented markdown prose into existing CLI documentation subjects.
Command.Name: import-command-prose

Command.Description: Import generic model documentation from a Meta workspace.
Command.Name: import-workspace-model

Command.Description: Import selected workspace instance documentation from a modeled opt-in policy.
Command.Name: import-workspace-instances

Command.Description: Add or update an opt-in entity policy for workspace instance documentation.
Command.Name: include-instance-entity

Command.Description: Add or update an opt-in property policy for workspace instance documentation.
Command.Name: include-instance-property

Command.Description: Add or update an opt-in relationship policy for workspace instance documentation.
Command.Name: include-instance-relationship

Command.Description: Merge multiple MetaDocs workspaces into a suite workspace.
Command.Name: merge

Command.Description: Validate a MetaDocs workspace lifecycle and reference integrity.
Command.Name: validate

Command.Description: Render a MetaDocs workspace as a static documentation site.
Command.Name: render-site
